prompt: A tidy set of pine birdhouse parts laid out on a workbench: labeled floor, side walls, roof panels, and a small perch dowel. Each piece is cleanly cut with crisp edges and a drilled round entrance hole in one wall. A tape measure and handsaw rest nearby with a pair of clear safety goggles. The solarpunk workshop background shows soft daylight, plants, and organized tools, with no text or logos. 512×512 photorealistic style, gently stylized but grounded in a real hobby workspace.
